title: Workflow of Generating a KYC Report
summary: This skill outlines the workflow for generating a Know Your Customer (KYC) report, encompassing company website research, GLEIF/LEI lookup, and adverse media/news screening to build a foundational client profile.

children.title: Gathering Information
children.description: Review the company's official website to understand its business overview, products/services, leadership team, strategic priorities, geographic footprint, and regulatory disclosures.

children.title: Retrieve Company Information using GLEIF database
children.description: Pull the company's Legal Entity Identifier (LEI), registered address, entity status, and analyze the ownership/organizational hierarchy, including both direct and ultimate parent relationships.

children.title: Surface Negative Information
children.description: Conduct adverse media screening by searching sources like Google News and public court/regulatory filings to identify any negative news, sanctions, regulatory actions, or legal proceedings involving the company.
